content.full_text:
November 17, 1976

Ms. Joyce Harrison
La Mirada Democratic Slate Headquarters
15420 Surrey Lane
La Mirada, California 90638

Dear Ms. Harrison:

Please forgive the delay in responding to your October letter.
The letter was incorrectly routed to the Secretary of State's
office.

On the basis of the information you outline in your letter, it
appears that you may have missed two filing deadlines and, un-
less your club already has a registration form on file with
the Secretary of State's office, you may be in violation of
the law for not filing a Statement of Organization within 10
days after receiving $500 to be used for a political purpose.

Please call me collect at your earliest convenience so if there
is a problem I may be of assistance.

Very truly yours,

Regina Siciliano-Kutchins
Technical Assistance Program Coordinator

RSK:bw

bcc: Jeanne P.

La MIRADA DEMOCRATIC SLATE HEADQUARTERS
13118 E. Rosecrans
P.O. Box 713
La Mirada, California 90638


The Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K. Street
Sacramento, California 95814


Gentlepersons

This is to check my actions regarding a Form 420 Report.

The La Mirada Democratic Slate Headquarters was opened
September 9, 1976 to direct Voter Registration, carry all
Democratic Candidates Literature, and direct Get-out-the-Vote
activities. We have not contributed any funds to/or for any
candidate or proposition on the November 2 ballot.

In order to open our doors and keep them open we have:

1. Received a Loan from the La Mirada Democrat
   Club in the amount of $600.00.
2. Had a Headquarters Opening Party for donations.
3. Had a Breakfast for donations.
4. Made Campaign Buttons and T-Shirts for donations.

I did not file a Form 420 Report, please advise regarding the
correctness or incorrectness of my actions.

Very truly yours

Joyce Harrison, Treasurer
La Mirada Democratic Slate Headquarters

JH

*Residence Address
15420 Surrey Lane
La Mirada, California 90638

RECEIVED
in the office of the
Secretary of State
OCT 27 1976

MARCH FONG EU Secretary of State

FPPC
Oct 26 9 22 AM '76

October 21, 1976

The Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K Street
Sacramento, California 95814


Dear Persons:

The La Mirada Democratic Club, #746537, has loaned
$600.00 to the La Mirada Democratic Headquarters
Committee. The money is to be used for voter reg-
istration and Get Out The Vote activities.

I hope that this meets the requirements for political
reporting.

Yours truly,

Marge Magnusson
Marge Magnusson, Treasurer
La Mirada Democratic Club
P.O. Box 713
La Mirada, Calif. 90637
